chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5488 of 2021 _________________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGE(S) _________________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Nazir’s report dated 11.11.2022 2. For hearing of CMA No.22988/2021 (Stay/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 08.04.2025 Ms. Dil Khurram Shaheen, advocate for petitioner Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for respondent No.2 It is jointly stated that the controversy is pending in S.C.R.A. No.704/2023, therefore, this petition may be disposed of with direction that the fate of the security herein shall be subject to the outcome of the aforesaid reference. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Gulsher/PS
